description: Core APIs (events for PTY streaming, window) + native folder dialog + open external URLs (any http(s) link, handed to the OS default browser — non-web schemes like file:// stay blocked) + scoped HTTP to the Chief API. Multi-window: the initial 'main' window plus opaque 'win-*' windows created at runtime (see projectWindows.ts). A window whose label matches no capability gets ZERO permissions in Tauri v2 — keep this glob in sync with the createWindow label prefix or invoke/listen silently break in new windows.
